title: Upload case documents and receive a cited answer
description: This verifies that a legal user can upload litigation files, ask a question, and receive an analysis response with source citations.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Upload valid litigation documents in supported formats
Ask a question about contradictions or date conflicts in the uploaded documents
Verify an analysis response is displayed
Verify source citations are displayed with the response

title: See the upload prompt before asking a question
description: This verifies that a user entering Playground without files is prompted to upload documents before they can ask questions.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Verify an empty state message prompting document upload is displayed
Verify the question input is not ready for use until documents are added

title: Preserve Playground state when switching away and back
description: This test verifies that a user who opens the Playground empty state and switches to Configuration can return to the Playground without losing the current view state.

steps.description: Navigate to the Playground view
Verify an empty state prompting document upload is displayed
Use the sidebar to switch to Configuration
Use the sidebar to switch back to Playground
Verify the Playground empty state is still displayed

title: Continue asking follow-up questions after returning to Playground with existing files
description: This verifies that a user revisiting Playground with previously uploaded documents can continue the conversation and still receive source-backed answers.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Verify previously uploaded documents are present
Ask a follow-up question about the existing documents
Verify a new source-backed answer is displayed

title: Update provider settings and save changes
description: This test verifies that a user can edit AI provider configuration values and save them successfully, resulting in a visible confirmation that the changes were applied.

steps.description: Navigate to the Configuration view
Update the provider configuration values with valid edits
Save the changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated provider settings are displayed

title: Switch from Playground to Configuration and back while preserving views
description: This verifies that the sidebar can move between Playground and Configuration and that each destination loads the correct view when revisited.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Use the sidebar to open Configuration
Verify the Configuration view is displayed
Use the sidebar to return to Playground
Verify the Playground view is displayed

title: Explore the home page and reach a product destination
description: This verifies that a prospective customer can use the marketing home page to navigate into a product area and arrive at the expected destination view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary entry point to the app
Verify the destination view is displayed
Verify the app shell navigation is available

title: Switch from Playground to Configuration
description: This test verifies that a user can move from the Playground to the Configuration view using the sidebar and see the configuration screen load correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to the Playground view
Use the sidebar to switch to Configuration
Verify the Configuration view is displayed

title: Review provider settings and save changes in Configuration
description: This verifies that an admin user can open provider settings, make an edit, save it, and see the updated configuration state.

steps.description: Navigate to /configuration
Review the current provider settings
Edit a provider setting value
Save the configuration changes
Verify the updated provider settings are displayed
Verify a save confirmation is visible

title: Open the demo request popup from the home page
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the demo request popup from the marketing page and see the modal appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo request action
Verify the demo popup is displayed
Verify the underlying page remains visible behind the popup

title: Keep updated provider settings after leaving and returning
description: This test verifies that after saving provider changes, the user can switch to Playground and return to Configuration without losing the saved settings.

steps.description: Navigate to the Configuration view
Update the provider configuration values with valid edits
Save the changes
Use the sidebar to switch to Playground
Use the sidebar to switch back to Configuration
Verify the updated provider settings are still displayed

title: Load the Configuration view from the app shell
description: This test verifies that the Configuration area can be opened directly from within the app shell and shows the provider settings interface.

steps.description: Navigate to the Configuration view
Verify provider settings are displayed

title: Review provider settings before editing
description: This test verifies that a user can inspect the current AI provider configuration values before making changes and that the settings screen remains readable and complete.

steps.description: Navigate to the Configuration view
Verify the available provider settings are displayed

title: Load Configuration from direct in-app navigation after starting in Playground
description: This test verifies that a user starting in Playground can directly navigate to Configuration from the app shell and see the expected destination view load.

steps.description: Navigate to the Playground view
Use the sidebar to switch to Configuration
Verify the Configuration view is displayed

title: Ask a question in Playground without uploading documents
description: This verifies that the Playground blocks unanswered document questions until files are uploaded and shows the expected guidance message.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Enter a question without uploading any documents
Submit the question
Verify a document upload prompt is displayed
Verify no analysis response is shown

title: Show validation when required provider settings are left empty
description: This test verifies that the configuration form blocks invalid empty provider settings and shows validation feedback instead of saving incomplete changes.

steps.description: Navigate to the Configuration view
Clear a required provider setting field
Save the changes
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the configuration changes were not saved

title: Dismiss the demo popup and return to the home page
description: This verifies that a visitor can close the demo popup and continue using the landing page without the popup remaining open.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo request action
Close the demo popup
Verify the popup is no longer displayed
Verify the home page content is still displayed
